# services.zitadel

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.zitadel`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.zitadel.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ZITADEL, a user and identity access management platform. |
| `services.zitadel.extraSettingsPaths` | `list of absolute path` | A list of paths to extra settings files. These will override the values set in [settings](#opt-services.zitadel.settings). Useful if you want to keep sensitive secrets out of the Nix store. |
| `services.zitadel.extraStepsPaths` | `list of absolute path` | A list of paths to extra steps files. These will override the values set in [steps](#opt-services.zitadel.steps). Useful if you want to keep sensitive secrets out of the Nix store. |
| `services.zitadel.group` | `string` | The group to run ZITADEL under. |
| `services.zitadel.masterKeyFile` | `absolute path` | Path to a file containing a master encryption key for ZITADEL. The key must be 32 bytes. |
| `services.zitadel.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the port specified in `listenPort` in the firewall. |
| `services.zitadel.package` | `package` | The ZITADEL package to use. |
| `services.zitadel.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Contents of the runtime configuration file. See <https://zitadel.com/docs/self-hosting/manage/configure> for more details. |
| `services.zitadel.settings.Port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port that ZITADEL listens on. |
| `services.zitadel.settings.TLS.Cert` | `null or string` | The TLS certificate, as a base64-encoded string. Note that the contents of this option will be added to the Nix store as world-readable plain text. Set [CertPath](#opt-services.zitadel.settings.TLS.CertPath) instead if this is undesired. |
| `services.zitadel.settings.TLS.CertPath` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the TLS certificate. |
| `services.zitadel.settings.TLS.Key` | `null or string` | The TLS certificate private key, as a base64-encoded string. Note that the contents of this option will be added to the Nix store as world-readable plain text. Set [KeyPath](#opt-services.zitadel.settings.TLS.KeyPath) instead if this is undesired. |
| `services.zitadel.settings.TLS.KeyPath` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the TLS certificate private key. |
| `services.zitadel.steps` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Contents of the database initialization config file. See <https://zitadel.com/docs/self-hosting/manage/configure> for more details. |
| `services.zitadel.tlsMode` | `one of "external", "enabled", "disabled"` | The TLS mode to use. Options are: - enabled: ZITADEL accepts HTTPS connections directly. You must configure TLS if this option is selected. - external: ZITADEL forces HTTPS connections, with TLS terminated at a reverse proxy. - disabled: ZITADEL accepts HTTP connections only. Should only be used for testing. |
| `services.zitadel.user` | `string` | The user to run ZITADEL under. |
